pr.title: Convert GrTNess to C and match basic functions
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Converted the Target Test Ness stage file from asm to a C translation unit, added a matching header, and switched obj_files.mk to build src/melee/gr/grtness.o instead of asm/melee/gr/grtness.o. The PR matched several trivial/basic GrTNess functions in C while retaining harder routines as inline asm. The author noted that this code is essentially line-for-line the same as GrTMars and other Target Tests stages, making it reusable for multiple similar stage conversions once the remaining C is matched.
what_changed: Renamed/converted asm/melee/gr/grtness.s into src/melee/gr/grtness.c with C includes and function definitions.
Updated obj_files.mk so TEXT_O_FILES uses $(BUILD_DIR)/src/melee/gr/grtness.o instead of $(BUILD_DIR)/asm/melee/gr/grtness.o.
Added src/melee/gr/grtness.h with prototypes for GrTNess_802225D0 through GrTNess_802228AC and included dolphin/types.h, functions.h, and sysdolphin/baselib/gobj.h.
Matched simple no-op functions as empty void C functions, including GrTNess_802225D0, GrTNess_80222644, GrTNess_80222790, GrTNess_80222794, GrTNess_80222824, and GrTNess_802228A0.
Matched simple constant-return functions in C, including GrTNess_8022266C, GrTNess_80222788, GrTNess_802227E8, GrTNess_80222878, and GrTNess_802228A4 returning 0, plus GrTNess_802228AC returning 1.

Matched small wrapper/callback functions in C with peephole enabled: GrTNess_80222648 calls func_801CAE04(0), GrTNess_802227F0 calls func_800115F4() then func_801C2FE0(gobj), and GrTNess_80222880 calls func_801C2FE0(gobj).
Kept more complex routines as inline asm with typed signatures, including GrTNess_802225D4, GrTNess_80222674, GrTNess_8022275C, GrTNess_80222798, and GrTNess_80222828.
smart_moves: Used a staged conversion strategy: move the file into src and match the easy/basic functions first while leaving nontrivial routines as inline asm.
Gave functions stage-prefixed names such as GrTNess_80222674, replacing generic func_80222674 references inside the file and improving searchability without claiming semantic names.
Added typed prototypes with HSD_GObj* parameters for object callback-style functions, making the converted file easier to integrate with the baselib gobj system.
Used #pragma push, #pragma peephole on, and #pragma pop around small C wrappers where compiler peephole behavior was needed for matching.
Recognized cross-stage duplication with GrTMars and other Target Tests stages, identifying this conversion as a template for several future stage files.
decomp_lessons: For highly repetitive Target Test stage files, compare against already-converted sibling stages such as GrTMars before decompiling from scratch.
Asm-to-C conversion can start by matching no-op, constant-return, and small forwarding functions; this reduces asm surface area and creates a C scaffold for harder routines.
When full semantic names are not yet known, a consistent module prefix plus address suffix, e.g. GrTNess_802228AC, is preferable to leaving generic func_ names in a stage-specific file.
Inline asm can preserve exact codegen for difficult functions while still allowing the object file to move from asm/ to src/ and participate in C-side header/prototype cleanup.
Small wrapper functions may require local pragma control, especially peephole on/off, to reproduce original codegen.
naming_conventions: Stage-specific functions were named with the GrTNess_ prefix followed by their original address, e.g. GrTNess_802225D0, GrTNess_80222674, and GrTNess_802228AC.
Header guard used the lowercase stage file style _grtness_h_.
Generic parameter names were still used where semantics were weak, e.g. param_1 for GrTNess_80222674(int param_1).
HSD_GObj* gobj was used for functions that operate on game objects, such as GrTNess_8022275C, GrTNess_80222798, GrTNess_802227F0, GrTNess_80222828, and GrTNess_80222880.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Converted the file path from asm/melee/gr/grtness.s to src/melee/gr/grtness.c while retaining inline asm for larger unmatched functions.
Used asm function declarations with nofralloc for functions that were not yet expressed in normal C.
Matched bare blr functions as empty C functions returning void.
Matched li r3, 0 / blr and li r3, 1 / blr functions as int functions returning 0 or 1.
Used #pragma peephole on around small functions that call func_801CAE04, func_800115F4, and func_801C2FE0.
Changed internal branch labels/calls from func_80222674 to GrTNess_80222674 after assigning the stage-specific symbol name.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that converted other Target Test stage files using GrTNess or GrTMars as a template.
Search for GrTNess_80222674 to see when the inline asm object creation routine was later matched in C.
Compare src/melee/gr/grtness.c against src/melee/gr/grtmars.c for reusable stage callback patterns.
Search for #pragma peephole on in stage files to identify other small wrapper matching tactics.
